attributes.content:
## Overview

The Sleep Record card gives the workspace a structured home for sleep tracking data (Oura Ring model): duration, stages, HRV, readiness score, and trends.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Sleep Record acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Document]]** -- Sleep Record can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Report]]** -- Sleep Record can feed rollups and summaries that surface trends, status, or outcomes.
- **[[Trigger]]** -- Changes to Sleep Record can fire automation, and automation can also create or update Sleep Record.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Sleep Record can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Contact]]** -- Sleep Record often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Health Record]]** -- Health Record can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Sleep Record.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Sleep Record as the structured home for sleep tracking data (Oura Ring model): duration, stages, HRV, readiness score, and trends and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Sleep Record when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Sleep Record stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
